raw_consumer_statement:
There is a charge on my American Express for {$430.00}. It was a fraudulent company who claimed to provide a seat change for a flight on XXXX XXXX I had. They didn't do the change. 

I provided American Express the receipts directly with XXXX XXXX for the seat changes I made and the original ticket. Anything related to the booking I have a receipt for from XXXX XXXX. All this was provided to AMEX. 

Amex asked that I provided a statement from the XXXX that no other outside company acted on my booking. I also sent this to AMEX. 

Amex insists that goods and services were provided, and it was not.
